name: @shamu/protocol-acp
description: Agent Client Protocol (ACP) client library for Shamu. JSON-RPC 2.0 over a pluggable transport (newline-delimited stdio today; HTTP-ACP if/when it lands). Consumed by @shamu/adapter-cursor (7.B) and @shamu/adapter-gemini (7.C); a future Phase 8 A2A bridge may also speak ACP directly. The protocol package owns framing + method dictionary + id correlation; adapters own auth method names, capability declarations, and permission policy.
